# Pretband Help Ons Bloaz'n

Pretband Help Ons Bloaz'n is a Dutch party brass band from Brummen, the Netherlands. The band is known for lively, high-energy performances at festivals, street parties, private celebrations, and corporate events throughout the Netherlands.

## About

Pretband is part of the Harmonieorkest Brummen community. The band's name plays on the Dutch expression "help ons blazen" ("help us blow/play"), reflecting its playful, crowd-pleasing character.

Pretband specializes in:
- **Walking acts** — mobile performances that move through crowds, parades, and festival grounds
- **Stage sets** — energetic performances for stages at festivals and events
- **Party repertoire** — upbeat covers and brass-band arrangements designed to get audiences moving and singing along
- **Custom bookings** — sets tailored to the type and size of the event

The band brings humor, showmanship, and musical energy to every performance, aiming to create an unforgettable experience for audiences of all ages.

## What Pretband plays

As a party brass band, Pretband typically performs upbeat, danceable arrangements — think popular hits, singalong classics, and festival anthems reworked for brass instrumentation, rather than traditional concert-band repertoire. (Specific setlists and instrumentation details can be added here once finalized.)

## Booking

Pretband is available to book for:
- Festivals
- Street parties and local events
- Private celebrations (birthdays, weddings, anniversaries)
- Corporate events and company parties

To book the band or ask about availability, reach out via email.

- **Contact:** info@pretband.nl
- **Website:** https://pretband.nl

## Community

Pretband is affiliated with Harmonieorkest Brummen, a wind orchestra based in Brummen. Visit their site to learn more about the wider musical community Pretband is part of.

## Links

- [Website](https://pretband.nl)
- [Email](mailto:info@pretband.nl)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/imreboersma/pretband)
- [Harmonieorkest Brummen](https://harmonieorkestbrummen.nl)

curl https://pretband.nl
